query:
-- Re-classify: the full SmileTel NBN bundle items are the primary NBN service
-- (they include 4G backup as a component but the primary service is NBN internet)
UPDATE billing_items SET retailBundleComponent = 'nbn'
WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied NBN%'
   OR description LIKE '%Site Bundle - Recurring%'
   OR description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied mobile broadband%';

-- Standalone 4G SIM backup (separate line item, not the bundle)
UPDATE billing_items SET retailBundleComponent = '4g_sim'
WHERE description LIKE '%4G SIM Backup Internet Service%';

-- Verify the updated counts
SELECT retailBundleComponent, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(lineAmount) as totalAmount
FROM billing_items
WHERE retailBundleComponent != ''
GROUP BY retailBundleComponent
ORDER BY count DESC;
